_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: MD / DNB equivalent (in General Medicine, Pediatric Medicine)
clinical_indications: Hematemesis (either red blood or coffee ground emesis)
Rectal Bleeding, usually in or with bleeding stools

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment
Complete Blood count, platelets, Liver Function Test, Hemoglobin

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment given details

ppd_preauth.q: Were the Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was the pathological report Complete Blood count, platelets, Liver Function Test, Hemoglobin submitted?
Was the Upper endoscopy report show presence of bleeding in Upper GI?
Did the patient complaint of Hematemesis, Black and tarry stool?
Did endoscopy report show presence of bleeding in upper GI?

cpd_claim.q: Was the Detailed Indoor case papers with the Treatment details submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes (evaluation findings, indications, or planned treatment) are missing or incomplete
Pathological report (Complete Blood count, platelets, Liver Function Test, Hemoglobin) is missing
Patient's complaint does not include Hematemesis or Black and tarry stool
Endoscopy report does not show presence of bleeding in Upper GI
Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment details are missing or incomplete

surgical_options: Transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt procedure or surgery (for rebleeding of variceal hemorrhage)
Surgery with severe and ongoing bleeding (after second attempt at endoscopic therapy fails)
